message:
fix(robot): replace NTM stub success responses with explicit not-implemented errors (ft-akx00.2.1)

NTM-gap commands (checkpoint, context, work, fleet, profile) previously
returned `"ok": true` with `"status": "stub"`, lying to machine callers
about command availability. Now they return `"ok": false` with error code
`robot.not_implemented`, an actionable hint, and the parsed command metadata
still attached in the data field for CLI→type bridging verification.

Changes:
- Add ROBOT_ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED ("robot.not_implemented") error code
- Replace build_ntm_stub_response with build_ntm_not_implemented_response
- Update all 5 call sites (Checkpoint, Context, Work, Fleet, Profile)
- Add "robot.not_implemented" to ErrorCode category mapping in robot_types.rs
- Add 5 regression tests covering error envelope, no-stub-status, all families,
  hint content, and elapsed_ms propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
